name: Reeses Candy Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt 2 sticks of margarine (do not use butter). Add the peanut butter and blend.
2. Melt the oleo and peanut butter in a microwave or on top of a stove. Add the powdered sugar and graham cracker crumbs. Mix everything well and press into a 9 x 13 pan.
3. Melt the chocolate chips with a generous tablespoon of shortening. Spread evenly on top. Let cool and cut into 1-inch squares.
